chosen_action.title: Upgrade ctxt.dev / Signum from generic contact discovery to an explicitly confirmed Telegram consulting path

why_this_action.summary: The current review window does not have a truthful fresh outbound lane, so the highest-leverage move was to strengthen the strongest untouched publisher target. Live site verification shows ctxt.dev's /work-with-me page explicitly sends consulting briefs to Telegram, which is a better contact path than the previously logged generic contact/about pages.

ctxtdev_upgrade.new_recommended_next_step: Telegram consulting contact path is explicitly confirmed

expected_outcome: Lower-friction follow-through on the strongest untouched publisher target once the current review window clears, with a verified contact route instead of generic contact-page guessing.

measurement_window.success_metric: Confirmed manual send via the verified work-with-me → Telegram route, then any reply, citation, backlink, or attributable qualified Codeberg inspection.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If this verified route still does not get used by the review checkpoint, stop refreshing ctxt.dev discovery and replace the lane.
